# PaulleDemon Awesome Landing Pages

- Source repo: https://github.com/PaulleDemon/awesome-landing-pages
- Vendored commit: e98eb80c593b8cd28d1f39556ccdda160a932581
- License: MIT (`source/license.txt`)
- Usage mode: adapted
- Deploy mode: Vite React routes in this Worker host

## Selected batch

This vendor source backs the `paulledemon-vite-20` batch manifest at `/manifest.paulledemon-vite-20.json`.

The upstream templates are stored as source provenance under `vendor/paulledemon-awesome-landing-pages/source`. The deployed eval pages are normalized Vite/React routes generated by `scripts/generate-corpus.mjs` so the corpus can run under one Cloudflare Worker without relying on per-template HTML entrypoints or separate build tooling.
